commit.subject: LU-00000 ptlrpc: Change struct nrs_tbf_rule to use kref
commit.message:
LU-00000 ptlrpc: Change struct nrs_tbf_rule to use kref

This patch changes struct nrs_tbf_rule to use
kref instead of atomic_t

This is for test and should fail.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I9c7fc2d26a1161576537621115d939c374d1d0e8
